Database._comment: Which warehouse the analytics API reads from: 'Neon' (Postgres) or 'Snowflake'.

ConnectionStrings._comment: Real values come from env vars (ConnectionStrings__Neon / ConnectionStrings__Snowflake) or appsettings.Development.json (gitignored). Do not commit credentials here.

Simulator._comment: Generates live activity. Hourly top-ups + a fresh rebuild every 24h. Only the simulated layer (rows dated >= LiveSinceUtc) is ever purged — seed history is never touched. LiveSinceUtc MUST be strictly after the seed's latest date.
